widgetData.source_sentence:
Instruct: Retrieve text with a similar pragmatic profile, including safety, emotion, sentiment, language, and identity-target signals
Query: Real estate is... volatile?

Well first off, risk is not volatility, and they're not even related (yeah, you have to take uni-level finance courses to learn this...).  So don't conflate the two terms.

Second, any dunce stupid enough to sell real estate for carry forward cap losses (you also do know that cap losses can only be applied against cap gains, yes?) is actually going to help bring liquidity into a market, right?
